description: Style NoteUnderstated socks from basics, with a subtle sheen crafted to contour your feet. Be assured of optimum durability and a soft ride even as the socks lend a refined finish to your Sports ensemble.Product DetailsSet of three in grey, white and charcoal greyPlush terry socks with a ribbed, elasticated cuff, branding below the cuff, padded footbed and print all overMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash coldDo not bleach, dry clean or ironTumble dry
